scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start -w backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
scripts.pack:desktop: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm --prefix desktop run pack
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm --prefix desktop run dist
